runtime_policy: repo-only source inspection; does not launch Clash95, CDB, wrappers, PowerShell, or visible windows

checks.name: visible runtime guard
checks.detail: scripts\cdb\run_cdb_battle_visible_input_probe.ps1 must keep the explicit AllowVisibleRuntime approval gate

checks.name: raw screen input mode
checks.detail: scripts\cdb\run_cdb_battle_visible_input_probe.ps1 must keep the raw-screen input path for HWND-free clicks

checks.name: fatal CDB pattern: Unable to insert breakpoint
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must detect fatal CDB log pattern: Unable to insert breakpoint

checks.name: fatal CDB pattern: Unable to remove breakpoint
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must detect fatal CDB log pattern: Unable to remove breakpoint

checks.name: fatal CDB pattern: Break instruction exception - code 80000003
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must detect fatal CDB log pattern: Break instruction exception - code 80000003

checks.name: post-g break exception gate
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must gate 80000003 break-instruction failures behind the post-g CDB state

checks.name: incremental log scan
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must process only new log lines so the initial loader break is not reclassified after g

checks.name: fatal wait failure throws
checks.detail: Wait-LogPattern must throw a clear failure when CDB becomes invalid before readiness
